title: Policy Evaluation Engine
description: Create authorization service with evaluate(agent, action, resource, context) method. Load applicable policies ordered by priority. Implement deny-overrides combining algorithm: if any deny matches, deny. If any allow matches, allow. Otherwise deny (default deny). Cache compiled policies in Redis. Add POST /api/v1/policies/evaluate for dry-run testing.
validation: Has evaluate(agent, action, resource, context) method
Loads applicable policies ordered by priority
Any matching deny policy results in denial
Requires explicit allow to grant access
Default deny when no policies match
